# Security policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are provided for the latest release of `rust-map-parser`.
Users should upgrade to the newest version before reporting a problem.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not open a public issue for a suspected vulnerability.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting for this repository:

https://github.com/Cooperkit/Rustmap-Parser/security/advisories/new

Include the affected version, reproduction steps, expected impact, and any
suggested mitigation. Please avoid attaching copyrighted Rust game assets or
maps containing private server data unless they are strictly necessary.
